heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 2241 Authorization of appropriations
text: Except as otherwise provided in (relating to temperature control devices at Shasta Dam, California), there is authorized to be appropriated not more than $120,000,000 in total for the period of fiscal years 2006 through 2028.section 2243 of this title1See Extension of Authorization of Appropriations note below.1
notes: Amendments2024— substituted “2028” for “2022”.Pub. L. 118–1702022— substituted “2022” for “2021”.Pub. L. 117–1032020— substituted “2021” for “2020”.Pub. L. 116–2602018— substituted “$120,000,000” for “$90,000,000” and “2020” for “2017”.Pub. L. 115–1412014— substituted “2017” for “2012”.Pub. L. 113–2352010— substituted “through 2012” for “through 2010”.Pub. L. 111–2122006— substituted “the period of fiscal years 2006 through 2010” for “fiscal years 1992, 1993, 1994, 1995, 1996, 1999, 2000, 2001, 2002, 2003, and 2004”.Pub. L. 109–2342003— substituted “2003, and 2004” for “and 2003”.Pub. L. 108–137substituted “2002, and 2003” for “and 2002”.Pub. L. 108–72001— substituted “2001, and 2002” for “and 2001”.Pub. L. 107–662000— substituted “2000, and 2001” for “and 2000”.Pub. L. 106–3771999— substituted “1999, and 2000” for “and 1997”.Pub. L. 106–601996— substituted “1996, and 1997” for “and 1996”.Pub. L. 104–206
